text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of Rice Shower's debut is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Everything starts for real once I go outside.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think my heart would pound so loudly.
Hehehe... I guess I really am scared.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. I can't be scared forever. I have to do my
best.
